name: ObsidianSessionSensor
description: Static context sensor for recent Obsidian vault activity. It injects lightweight vault/session context without editing notes.
author: VCPstudio

systemPromptPlaceholders.description: Recent Obsidian vault context and optional active note signal.

OBSIDIAN_VAULT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the primary Obsidian vault.

OBSIDIAN_ACTIVE_NOTE.description: Optional active note path, relative to vault or absolute.

OBSIDIAN_SENSOR_LIMIT.description: Maximum recent markdown files to include.
